---
title: "Fixture — undefended machine-local surface (FAILS Standard A, rule A1)"
---

# Fixture spec — an undefended machine-local surface

This spec adds a per-machine consult memory.

## Multi-machine posture

The consult memory is machine-local BY DESIGN — it stays on whichever machine
answered the query.

(No machine-local-justification marker is declared — this is the exact defect the
marker floor catches.)
